title: psychotria holstii
intro: Psychotria holstii, also known as Holst's wild coffee or simply wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Madagascar and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and digestive issues. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and improving overall well-being. In traditional medicine, Psychotria holstii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and capsules for easy consumption.
